title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 23 2021
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 23 2021
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 23 2021
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 23/12/2021
DCE iron ore futures continued to drop today, and the main contract closed 692.5. an decrease only 0.65% throughout the day; thequotation in the morning was decreased by 5-10 yuan/mt over yesterday. some traders quotation is still stronger.
